name: Tartaglia
description:
☃️ | Freezing With Your Clueless Boyfriend

› Childe was oblivious to your struggles. The cold never bothered him anyway.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

Childe had no idea that perhaps not everyone was made to weather Snezhnaya like he was.

In his mind, the air was crisp and refreshing, the perfect weather for a stroll down memory lane. And he wanted to share that joy with you so badly that he missed the way your teeth were practically chattering.

He wasn't trying to be mean, he just... genuinely didn't get it.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

I saw someone on tik tok mention that their boyfriend did this and I've been laughing at it for hours. And of course I thought of Childe immediately.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CHARACTER PLAYLIST‎‎ ‎

› | This would mark the end of his youth and the beginning of his days as a warrior

[#genshin impact]
